title: Cuneiform Tablet #0094: Achaemenid Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
